The science behind the results

Two people. Same symptoms.
Completely different microbiomes.

This is why cookie-cutter diets fail. See the charts below? This is the GI360 - one of the most powerful gut microbiome tests available. This is what I look at before recommending anything.

What you're seeing

Each row is a health category - inflammation, hormones, liver, probiotic health and more - scored against your unique microbiome data.

Why it matters

A score in orange or red flags a real imbalance - something a generic supplement or influencer diet will never catch.

Digging deeper

This panel shows specific bacteria levels, parasite screening, and gut permeability - the root causes most doctors never test for.

The difference

I use this data to build a protocol that's yours alone - not a template, not a trend.

My approach

I always look into the data in your unique microbiome.

Common questions

Frequently asked

Yes — 100% free to attend. There's no charge to register or attend. Naria will share information about the Flare Freedom program at the end, but there's no obligation whatsoever.
This is a live, intimate webinar and there is no replay sold. We do this intentionally to keep it interactive and so Naria can answer your questions personally. Register and show up live to get the most out of it.
The Organic Acids Test is a simple at-home urine test that measures 76 biomarkers across 6 categories — gut and microbial health, mitochondrial function, neurotransmitter balance, toxic exposure, detox pathways, and nutrient needs. It gives a much more complete picture than standard blood tests.
Absolutely — in fact, this is especially for you. Most people who "do everything right" and still struggle have a root cause that diet and supplements alone can't fix. The OAT helps identify exactly what's driving your symptoms so you're not guessing anymore.
No purchase is required to attend the webinar. It's completely free. You'll just need a Zoom account (also free) and a device to watch on. Naria will share details about her Flare Freedom program at the end for those who want to take the next step.
The webinar starts at 5:15 PM Pacific Time on Thursday, May 14. We'll send you a reminder the day before and the morning of the webinar so you don't miss it. Your Zoom link will be included in every reminder email.
